In a rondeau over medium heat, render bacon until slightly crispy
Once rendered, add in shallots and thyme.  Allow to sweat
Once sweated, with shallots transluscent but not gaining colour, add toasted garlic and incorporate well.
Finish with dill and tarragon.  Remove from the heat.
Strain the bacon mixture through a chinois fine mesh strainer, reserving bacon mixture to sheet tray lined with sport towel
Allow to cool before reserving to quart containers and storing in cooler
Reserve bacon fat in quart containers and store in cooler.
